title: IoT Communications Criteria Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the key criteria (Power, Range, Bandwidth, Cost) used to select appropriate communication protocols for IoT devices and how these criteria influence each other.
elements: Protocol Selection (e.g., LoRaWAN, NB-IoT, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)
relationships: Power availability dictates possible range and bandwidth
Range requirement influences power consumption and protocol choice
Bandwidth needs affect power consumption and cost
All criteria converge to determine the optimal protocol selection
